profile.name: Priyadharsan T
profile.title: Backend Developer • Frontend Developer • Problem Solver
profile.tagline: Building complete backend systems, clean frontend interfaces, cloud-ready applications, and solving problems with structured thinking.

about.title: Backend-first student developer with real college web experience.
paragraphs: I am a B.Tech AI & DS student at Velammal Engineering College with separate strengths in complete backend development, frontend development, AWS Cloud, and problem solving.
As Backend TL at WebOps, I work on real college web systems, maintain website backend flows, collaborate with teammates, and contribute to admission portal development.
I like building practical systems that are clean, reliable, and useful for real users, while continuously improving my coding and problem-solving ability.

skillsIntro: A focused stack for building web applications, backend services, APIs, and automation workflows.

experience.title: WebOps Backend TL
points: Maintaining and improving the college website backend
Building backend features for student-facing and admin-facing flows
Collaborating with the WebOps team on production website updates
Contributing to admission portal workflows and data handling
